summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Critical failures: (1) TDD methodology entirely absent—code written before tests, no test file provided; (2) Missing fixtures (fixtures/commits-*.txt), test file (version-bumper.test.ts), and config files (package.json, tsconfig.json); (3) Cannot execute: run-tests.ts references missing files, tests cannot run; (4) No verification artifacts (act-result.txt not created); (5) Workflow action refs not pinned to SHAs (lines 9-10 should use full commit hashes). Source code quality (version-bumper.ts, bump-version.ts) is reasonable with good TypeScript practices (explicit types, clear interfaces), but absence of ANY tests violates core requirement 'write failing test FIRST.' Workflow logic sound but untested. Does not fulfill TDD requirement or CI/CD validation requirements.
